title: FIFA World Cup Uncut | Mbappe and Those Dramatic Minutes | Argentina vs France (2022 Final)
finalScore: Argentina 3, France 3 - Argentina won 4-2 on penalties
homeJerseyColor: white and sky-blue striped Argentina shirts with white shorts
awayJerseyColor: navy France shirts with navy shorts

homeRoster.name: Angel Di Maria
homeRoster.notes: Won the first-half penalty and scored Argentina second goal.

awayRoster.name: Kylian Mbappe
awayRoster.notes: Scored a late hat-trick, including two goals in two minutes.

playerIdentificationNotes: Use player names only when the shirt number, team kit, body context, or repeated possession context is visually clear.
If the number is not readable, say the role instead: Argentina winger, Argentina midfielder, France forward, France fullback, goalkeeper, referee, ball carrier.
Argentina wear white and sky-blue stripes; France wear navy. Do not mix teams when names and numbers are unclear.
Messi is Argentina #10 in the striped kit. Mbappe is France #10 in the navy kit. Name them only when kit or context is visually clear.
This clip focuses on the dramatic late minutes of the 2022 final; do not announce future goals or the penalty shootout unless the visible action supports it.
broadcastNotes: Use football vocabulary: penalty area, touchline, cross, press, counter, save, volley, clearance, equaliser, attack, extra time.
Do not use basketball terms such as court, possession reset, dribble in the lane, tip-off, rebound, screen, or three-pointer.
Keep calls short and live: 4 to 12 words, one sentence, broadcast cadence.
The source feed should arrive through Agora Media Gateway as live RTC video, not as a browser-captured local file.
The key story is France coming alive late behind Mbappe after Argentina controlled much of the match.
storyline: Lusail, December 18, 2022: Argentina led France before Kylian Mbappe dragged the final into chaos with a rapid late surge. WorldCupVoice adds AI live commentary over the raw broadcast feel.
